ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – Your Feedback Requested
ham.body:
Hi Amit,

I hope you are doing well. I wanted to let you know that the issue you reported in ticket #12345 has been fixed in the latest release. The bug that was causing the crash when uploading large files has been addressed.

Key changes:
- Updated image processing library to version 2.3.1.
- Added fallback logic for file size checks.
- Improved logging for better diagnostics.

You can review the changes in the GitHub PR <URL> and the Jira ticket <URL>. Please test it in your environment and let me know if everything works as expected.

Thanks for your patience.

Best,
Rahul

spam.subject: URGENT: Meeting Invitation – Your Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Team,

This is an official invitation to the upcoming Quarterly Review meeting scheduled for 25th April 2026 at 10:00 AM IST. The meeting will be hosted on Zoom/Teams and is mandatory for all department heads.

Meeting ID: 123-456-7890
Password: Q4R1

To join the meeting, please click <URL>. If you are unable to join at the scheduled time, inform me as soon as possible so we can arrange a re-schedule.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best Regards,
Suman
HR Manager
